THERESA-PURE_WATER.title: PureWater
THERESA-MAO_CREST.title: MaoCrest
THERESA-NAMELESS_TOTEM.description:
Upon pickup, choose [blue]{SelectCount}[/blue] cards from your deck to [red]Remove[/red].
For each [red]Attack[/red] removed, add a [gold]Sarkaz See[/gold] to your deck.
For each [blue]Skill[/blue] removed, add a [gold]Sarkaz Tell[/gold] to your deck.
THERESA-NAMELESS_TOTEM.flavor: A faceless totem, said to have once belonged to someone nameless.
THERESA-NAMELESS_TOTEM.title: Nameless Totem
THERESA-BABEL_WORD.title: The Final Chapter
THERESA-BABEL_WORD.description:
At the start of your turn, draw cards equal to the difference if your [orange]Dust[/orange] count is below the cap.
At the end of your turn, [orange]Dust[/orange] cards that were [gold]Lingered[/gold] this turn gain [red]Ethereal[/red] and [red]Exhaust[/red], then move to the discard pile.
THERESA-BABEL_WORD.flavor: The legacy of Babel, the last page of the story.
THERESA-UNKNOWN_RELIC.title: Unparsed Code
THERESA-UNKNOWN_RELIC.description:
Records the number of actions executed in combat.

During card rewards, you may [gold]Record[/gold]: randomly save 1 card to the removed cards list (without adding it to your deck).
THERESA-UNKNOWN_RELIC.flavor: You don't need to understand how it works. You only need to acknowledge this fact: it interprets the essence of this world.
THERESA-KNOWN_RELIC.title: Civilight Eterna
THERESA-KNOWN_RELIC.description:
Has recorded [blue]{ActionCount}[/blue] actions.

Upon reaching each threshold, gain the corresponding effect at the start of combat:
[blue]2000[/blue]: Gain 1 [green]Strength[/green] and [green]Dexterity[/green].
[blue]4000[/blue]: Also gain 1 [gold]Energy[/gold] and draw 1 card.
[blue]6000[/blue]: Also put a random [blue]Power[/blue] card into your hand with 0 cost.
[blue]8000[/blue]: Also gain 5 [green]Max HP[/green] (reverted after combat).
[blue]10000[/blue]: Once only, heal to 100% HP upon receiving fatal damage.
THERESA-KNOWN_RELIC.flavor: A small black crown. Now you know what it carries.
THERESA-BA_MISS_US_WORD.title: Ba'missus's Ravings
THERESA-BA_MISS_US_WORD.description:
At the start of combat, gain [red]6 Hate[/red].
At the end of your turn, if [red]Hate[/red] exceeds [green]Hope[/green], apply [red]1 Hate[/red] to ALL enemies.
THERESA-BRAVE_BLADE.title: Brave Blade
THERESA-BRAVE_BLADE.description:
Cards with [gold]Silk[/gold] deal [red]33%[/red] more damage.
At the start of your turn, weave [gold]Mind Silk[/gold] into a random [red]Attack[/red] in your hand.
THERESA-DEAD_CANE.title: Dead Cane
THERESA-DEAD_CANE.description:
At the start of your turn, apply [blue]3[/blue] [red]Apoptosis[/red] to ALL enemies, plus [blue]1[/blue] for each time you dealt damage last turn.
When an enemy dies, heal [green]1[/green] HP.
THERESA-EYE_SPY.title: Eye Spy
THERESA-EYE_SPY.description:
At the start of combat, gain [blue]1[/blue] [gold]End Shadow[/gold].
At the start of your turn, gain [gold]1[/gold] {energyPrefix:energyIcons(1)}.
If you lost HP last turn, lose [gold]2[/gold] {energyPrefix:energyIcons(1)} instead.
THERESA-GO_DUDE_NO_WORD.title: Go'dude's Silence
THERESA-GO_DUDE_NO_WORD.description:
At the start of combat, gain [blue]6[/blue] [green]Plated Armor[/green].
After you lose HP, gain [blue]2[/blue] [green]Plated Armor[/green].
Upon victory, heal HP equal to half your [green]Plated Armor[/green].
THERESA-HATRED_TIME.title: Hatred of the Era
THERESA-HATRED_TIME.description:
At the start of combat, apply [blue]1[/blue] [red]Era of Vengeance[/red] to ALL enemies.
When a new enemy appears, apply [blue]1[/blue] [red]Era of Vengeance[/red] to it.
THERESA-IRE_SHY_WORD.title: Ire'shys Whisper
THERESA-IRE_SHY_WORD.description:
After you play a card, trigger its [gold]Silk[/gold] effect.
If it has no [gold]Silk[/gold], weave [gold]Mind Silk[/gold] into it.
THERESA-LITERATURE_BEGINS.title: Literature Begins
THERESA-LITERATURE_BEGINS.description:
At the start of your turn, gain [gold]1[/gold] {energyPrefix:energyIcons(1)}.
At the start of combat, enter [red]Disaster Stance[/red].
THERESA-LITTLE_CUBE.title: Little Cube
THERESA-LITTLE_CUBE.description: For every [blue]3[/blue] cards played automatically: gain [green]5 Block[/green], draw [blue]1[/blue] card, then reduce the cost of a random card in hand by [gold]1[/gold] this turn.
THERESA-SINGER_MASK.title: Singer's Mask
THERESA-SINGER_MASK.description:
Your non-[red]Attack[/red] damage is increased by [blue]2[/blue].
At the start of your first turn, weave [gold]Tear Silk[/gold] into a random card in your hand.
After you play a [blue]Power[/blue] card, weave [gold]Tear Silk[/gold] into a random card in your hand.
THERESA-TEN_RINGS.title: Ten Rings
THERESA-TEN_RINGS.description:
At the start of combat, gain [blue]1[/blue] [gold]Echo[/gold].
Every [blue]2[/blue] turns, increase your [gold]Dust[/gold] cap by [blue]1[/blue] (max [blue]10[/blue]).
THERESA-THE_RECALL.title: The Recall
THERESA-THE_RECALL.description:
Your [green]Hope[/green] and [red]Hate[/red] maximums are increased by [blue]2[/blue].
After your turn begins, gain [blue]1[/blue] of whichever of [green]Hope[/green] and [red]Hate[/red] you have less of (gain both if tied).
THERESA-UNTOLD_FRAGMENTS.title: Untold Fragments
THERESA-UNTOLD_FRAGMENTS.description:
At the end of your turn, if you have [gold]Energy[/gold] remaining, trigger [gold]Silk[/gold] on all [gold]Dust[/gold] cards once.
If your [gold]Energy[/gold] is full, trigger again.
